Name: Quote Draft item row
Description: Основной источник item-level pricing inputs: dimensions, weight, qty, packaging, protection, storage и flags.
Key Fields: Item name, dimensions, weight, qty, packaging, protection, declared value, storage, flags
Source / Owner: index.html / js/ui.js

Name: Quick Quote catalog transfer
Description: Переносит данные из Quick Quote в Full Quote, чтобы broker не вводил catalog dimensions повторно.
Key Fields: Catalog dimensions, weight, packaging defaults transferred to Full Quote
Source / Owner: quick-quote.html / js/quickQuote.js / js/itemCatalog.js
Risk Note: Preserves catalog dimensions unless volume manually overridden.

Name: Item Catalog
Description: Содержит default item templates; используется как стартовая база размеров/веса для быстрых расчетов.
Source / Owner: js/itemCatalog.js
Risk Note: Seed catalog, not SKU-specific production source.

Name: ZIP Dictionary
Description: Главный справочник route classification: ZIP определяет service area, branch и zone class.
Source / Owner: Определять service area, branch, core/corridor/remote/out-of-zone.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Zone normalization
Description: Приводит raw zone к canonical zone, чтобы distance matrix и pricing использовали единые названия зон.
Source / Owner: js/variables.js normalizeZoneName
Risk Note: Examples: NYC -> NY Area, CA (LA) -> CA South.

Name: Distance Matrix
Description: AS-IS static/average distance source для pickup, delivery и interstate mileage.
Key Fields: Canonical zone pair distances and same-zone local distances
Source / Owner: js/variables.js distanceMatrix

Name: Vehicles Reference
Description: Vehicle reference хранит capacity, payload, MPG и maintenance; используется для fit, fuel и route cost.
Key Fields: Capacity, payload, fuel type, MPG, calculation MPG, maintenance
Source / Owner: js/variables.js vehicleTypes / PricingConfig vehicles
Used In: Vehicle fit, fuel, mileage, interstate allocation

Name: Fuel Prices Reference
Description: Fuel reference хранит актуальные fuel prices and surcharge для расчета fuel cost per mile.
Source / Owner: js/variables.js fuelPrices / PricingConfig fuelPrices storage

Name: Packaging Rates
Description: Packaging rate table связывает selected packaging type с item-level packaging amount.
Source / Owner: js/variables.js packagingRates

Name: Protection Plans
Description: Protection plans reference определяет RV/FVP/DV pricing, fixed fees and customer wording.
Source / Owner: RV/FVP/DV pricing и customer wording.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Access Conditions
Description: Access conditions source: COI, stairs, floor, narrow access, elevator unavailable, long carry and crew inputs.
Key Fields: COI, stairs, floor, narrow, elevator unavailable, long carry, crew
Source / Owner: Quote Draft access fields / saved drafts
Risk Note: Some legacy fields are hidden in current broker UI.

Name: Quote Options
Description: Quote options source: priority, exclusive, special labor, manual adjustment and direct flags.
Key Fields: Priority, exclusive delivery, special labor, manual adjustment, direct flags
Source / Owner: Quote Draft options

Name: Estimate Snapshot
Description: Estimate snapshot freezes formulaVersion, variablesSnapshot, quote and result so old estimates remain auditable.
Source / Owner: js/ui.js / js/storage.js
Risk Note: Frozen historical estimates should use saved result.

Name: Service Areas
Description: Service area reference задает warehouse point, density/corridor/remote logic и ownership зоны.
Source / Owner: Хранить branch, warehouse point, zone density и правила зоны.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Distance Matrix / Route Engine
Description: Distance source для local, interstate and direct mileage; должен различать exact и average methods.
Source / Owner: Давать local/interstate/exact mileage.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Vehicles
Description: Vehicle reference позволяет добавлять/менять машины без переписывания формул. Должен хранить не только capacity/payload/cost, но и ссылки на реальные cargo body dimensions.
Key Fields: vehicleType, vehicleName, capacityVolume, capacityWeight, MPG, costPerMile, cargoBodySpecId, activeFlag
Source / Owner: Выбирать vehicle и считать cost без изменения формул.
Used In: Vehicle fit, interstate, local operations, dimensional fit
Risk Note: Обязателен до scaling; dimensions должны быть отдельным source of truth.

Name: Labor
Description: Labor reference хранит crew roles, wage, minimum time and time coefficients for pickup/delivery/access.
Source / Owner: Хранить crew, helper, wage и time coefficients.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Items Catalog
Description: Items catalog задает default dimensions, weight and handling flags for item-level calculations.
Source / Owner: Default dimensions, weight, handling flags.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Packaging / Crate Materials
Description: Packaging/crate material reference нужен для size-based crate formula and approved material prices.
Source / Owner: Материалы и ставки для crate.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Storage Rates
Description: Storage rates reference задает тарифы хранения по volume/time и effective date.
Source / Owner: Storage by volume/time.

Name: Benchmark Cases
Description: Benchmark cases reference нужен для preview impact перед сохранением pricing variables.
Source / Owner: Preview changes before saving variables.

Name: Payroll Roles / Wage Rates
Description: Справочник ставок по ролям нужен для crew pay, helper pay и fully loaded labor cost.
Source / Owner: Содержит ставки оплаты crew/helper/driver по role, branch, effective date.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Broker Compensation Plans
Description: Определяет broker commission rules, eligibility, caps/floors and payout event.
Key Fields: brokerId, channel, commissionRate, cap, floor, eligibilityEvent
Source / Owner: Хранит правила выплат broker по broker/channel/source.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Dispatcher Compensation Plans
Description: Определяет модель выплат dispatcher и allocation по stages/orders.
Source / Owner: Хранит per-order/per-revenue/KPI payout rules.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Overhead Allocation Rules
Description: Нужен для fully loaded cost и contribution margin.
Source / Owner: Определяет, как распределять admin/ops overhead на заказ.

Name: Capacity Economics
Description: Нужен для route capacity opportunity cost и bulky premium.
Source / Owner: Хранит route capacity rate, utilization thresholds and premium rules.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Location / Address Types
Description: Справочник типов точки pickup/delivery. UI уже собирает House, Apartments, Business, Warehouse, Auction; справочник должен задавать, как тип точки влияет на время, усилие, доступ, crew и риск ожидания.
Key Fields: addressType, stage, baseTimeMultiplier, fixedLocationMinutes, accessComplexityMultiplier, crewImpact, loadingDockDefault, parkingComplexity, coiDefault, activeFlag
Source / Owner: Отделить address type от access conditions и использовать его как источник коэффициентов time/effort.
Used In: Pickup time, delivery time, access effort, crew split, labor cost, margin guardrail
Risk Note: Нужен источник данных и бизнес-утверждение коэффициентов.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Historical Time Metrics
Description: Фактическое время прошлых заказов для калибровки pickup/delivery коэффициентов.
Key Fields: orderId, stage, addressType, volume, weight, itemCount, crew, actualMinutes, dataQuality
Source / Owner: Хранить фактические stop/stage times and context.
Risk Note: Нужен сбор данных и правила качества.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Access Time Reference
Description: Минуты влияния floor/stairs/elevator/long carry/COI/narrow access.
Source / Owner: Хранит stage-specific access time impacts.
Risk Note: Нужно избежать double-counting с access fees.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Packaging Time Reference
Description: Время упаковки по packaging type и item count.
Source / Owner: Хранит minutes per item and minimums.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Crate Labor Reference
Description: Время изготовления crate по size/complexity.
Source / Owner: Хранит minutes per sq ft and minimum labor.
Risk Note: Нужно утвердить вместе с crate formula.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Time Data Quality Rules
Description: Правила доверия к time data.
Source / Owner: Определяет trusted/estimated/incomplete/excluded.
Risk Note: Без quality rules coefficients могут быть искажены.

Name: Item Handling / Crew Feasibility Rules
Description: Справочник правил item-level handling. Главный driver для one-person feasibility - вес самой тяжелой физической единицы, а не общий объем и не weight x quantity. Volume остается важным для capacity/time, но не должен автоматически означать 2+ crew.
Key Fields: itemType, unitItemWeightBand, totalPieceBand, heavyPieceThreshold, itemLengthBand, awkwardnessClass, onePersonEligibleFlag, minCrew, minutesPerPiece, helperActiveMinutes, exceptionRule, activeFlag
Source / Owner: Определять, можно ли pickup/delivery выполнить одним человеком, когда нужен helper, сколько мест обрабатывать, и какие lightweight bulky exceptions разрешены.
Used In: Item handling score, crew split, piece handling time, helper active time, pickup/delivery labor cost, margin guardrail
Risk Note: Нужно утвердить thresholds по unit weight, piece count, helper policy и собрать field feedback.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Physical Access Feasibility Rules
Description: Справочник физической проходимости: сопоставляет item/crate dimensions с doorway, elevator, stairs, turns, narrow access and long carry.
Key Fields: accessType, itemDimensionLimit, doorwayWidth, elevatorDepth, stairTurnLimit, crateFlag, reviewRule, extraMinutes, activeFlag
Source / Owner: Выявлять hard access blockers, manual review и extra labor до утверждения quote.
Used In: Hard access crew rule, manual review, access risk, helper active minutes
Risk Note: Нужен data capture по access dimensions; на MVP может быть manual review rule.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Vehicle Dimensions / Cargo Body Specs
Description: Справочник реальных габаритов кузова и дверных проемов всего парка: Sprinter, Box Truck, Penske, van и другие vehicle types. Высота вроде 72 in является параметром конкретного кузова, а не общей формульной константой.
Key Fields: cargoBodySpecId, vehicleType, cargoInteriorLengthIn, cargoInteriorWidthIn, cargoInteriorHeightIn, doorOpeningWidthIn, doorOpeningHeightIn, payloadLb, capacityCuFt, rampFlag, liftGateFlag, tieDownFlag, activeFlag
Source / Owner: Проверять dimensional fit, selected vehicle height exceeded, side transport и необходимость машины с более высоким кузовом.
Used In: Vehicle dimensional fit, selected vehicle height check, door opening fit, higher body vehicle recommendation, equipment requirement
Risk Note: Нужно собрать размеры всего парка; любые 72/96/155 in хранить как данные конкретного body spec.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Warning / Approval Rules
Description: Справочник red flags и approval правил: что срабатывает, какой severity, блокирует ли quote, кто approve.
Key Fields: ruleId, triggerFormula, severity, messageRu, blocksQuote, approvalRole, activeFlag
Source / Owner: Дать broker/admin понятные предупреждения и не выпускать рискованные estimates без подтверждения.

Name: Formula Constants Audit
Description: Карта всех числовых коэффициентов в формулах: что означает число, какая переменная его заменяет, кто утверждает.
Key Fields: constantValue, variableId, formulaId, meaning, owner, status
Source / Owner: Убрать скрытые hardcoded numbers из pricing formulas.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Route Capacity Cost Reference
Description: Справочник полной стоимости route/truck capacity для распределения interstate cost между заказами.
Key Fields: routeId, vehicleType, fullRouteCapacityCost, costPerCuFt, costPerLb, effectiveDate
Source / Owner: Считать interstate cost по лимитирующему фактору объема/веса.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.

Name: Formula Version Registry
Description: Реестр версий формул и правил, используемых в snapshot.
Source / Owner: Сделать старые estimates воспроизводимыми после изменения variables/references.

Name: Manual ZIP Override Register
Description: Справочник утвержденных ручных изменений ZIP/zone/corridor/remote классификации.
Key Fields: zip, overrideZone, reason, approvedBy, activeFrom, activeTo
Source / Owner: Позволить быстро править зоны без переписывания кода.
Test Assumption: Use current local seed/reference fixture for tests; production source and owner remain required.
